project_type: Full-stack VPN panel: Go backend + Vue 3 SPA frontend (admin + portal)
build_system: Vite for frontend, go build for backend
test_framework: vitest for frontend (shared + admin), go test for backend
build_command: cd panel/web/admin && npm install && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
test_command: cd panel/web/admin && npx vitest run; cd ../shared && npx vitest run
verification_instructions: 1. Run vue-tsc --noEmit in admin and portal to check types. 2. Run vite build in admin and portal. 3. Run vitest run in admin and shared.
setup_instructions: cd panel/web/admin && npm install; cd ../portal && npm install; cd ../shared && npm install
environment_constraints: Network mode allows npm install. No docker daemon available. Go build available.
contribution_requirements: Push to a new branch (not ui-fixes-v2). Create new PR.
key_patterns: Components use <script setup lang='ts'>, Koris design system components (@koris/ui/*), shared composables (@koris/composables/*), i18n via registerMessages + useI18n pattern. RTL already has CSS rules in style.css and useI18n sets dir attribute. Stores use Pinia defineStore. Realtime notifications via WebSocket in realtime store.
directory_structure: panel/web/admin/src/ - Admin SPA (components, views, stores, router, i18n). panel/web/portal/src/ - Customer portal. panel/web/shared/ - Shared composables and UI components. node/cmd/node/main.go - Node agent source.
